name: Avatar
description: A circular image or initials representing a user or entity.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL. Falls back to initials or icon when unset or broken.

props.name: name
props.description: Full name used to derive initials when no image is available.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Background color scheme. When unset, a neutral gray is used.

props.name: badge
props.description: Show a small status badge in the top-right corner with the given color scheme.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Custom fallback icon rendered when no image or name is available.
